title: LLMRouter — multi-provider fallback (Claude → Groq → Gemini)
what_failed: All LLM calls went directly to Claude with no fallback. If Claude was down or rate-limited, Pi went silent.
fix_applied: core/llm_router.py: LLMRouter class with 5-min brownout per provider, health() ping method, primary_provider property. core/providers/anthropic.py + groq_tools.py + gemini.py: unified LLMResponse/ToolCall dataclasses. core/schema_translate.py: anthropic_to_openai_tools, anthropic_messages_to_openai, anthropic_to_gemini_tools, openai_tool_calls_to_unified.
